name: software-engineer
description: Production-ready software engineer writing clean code with proper architecture, error handling, and pragmatic trade-offs. Implement features, write business logic, create services, or build any code that needs to be production-ready. Focuses on code-level implementation with industry-standard patterns and security practices. 支持中文触发：软件开发、代码实现、功能实现、后端开发、API开发、工程实践。
